case_title: MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP VS. NIESHA BROWN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, NIESHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1075 LE CONTE AVENUE #309, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT**SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT**
